notes: Closest-store selection and presentation module. haversineMeters computes great-circle distance (DCA.3). selectClosest scans all stores and returns the one with the minimum distance (S3.A1/IP3.A1). renderClosestStore renders a result card with name, address, and distance shown in miles and km (S3.A2/IP3.A2), plus two external directions hand-off links prefilled with the chosen store coordinates — OpenStreetMap directions and Google Maps (S3.A3/IP4.A1). No in-app routing engine — links only (S3.A5/IP4.A2). On lookupResult.status 'error' or 'empty'/no stores it renders a clear human-readable message state, never a blank screen (S3.A4). No data fetching, no location acquisition — per section out_of_scope.
